summary: Backend admin management app with super admin role functionality. Includes a temporary forceSetMeAsSuperAdmin function for development/testing purposes.
architectural_notes: Backend uses adminStore (map of principal -> record with role field) for admin management
Admin roles include at least #super_admin role type

new_feature_requests.summary: Add temporary forceSetMeAsSuperAdmin function to backend that sets caller's role to #super_admin in adminStore without changing other logic or data structures
